title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 48
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a lost cap.
items.audio_script: Girl: Did you finally find your cap? You looked everywhere before class this morning. || Boy: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the park, because I remembered using it there yesterday. || Girl: And did you try the shop counter? You said you went there afterwards. || Boy: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then the swimming teacher sent me a message and said [1]I had left my cap beside the swimming pool[/1]. I must have put it there without noticing. || Girl: What a relief. You will need it later. || Boy: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Did you finally find your cap? You looked everywhere before class this morning.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I checked the park, because I remembered using it there yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: And did you try the shop counter? You said you went there afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I did, but nobody had seen it. Then the swimming teacher sent me a message and said I had left my cap beside the swimming pool. I must have put it there without noticing.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: What a relief. You will need it later.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Exactly. I'll pick it up before lunch.

items.question: Where is the cap?
items.explanation: The speaker says they had left the cap beside the swimming pool.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go to the book festival after school? I was looking forward to it. || Man: I don't think so. The event finished yesterday, so that plan will not work today. || Woman: We could meet at the cafe instead. That might be fun. || Man: I checked, but it is full because of a party. My cousin had a different idea: [1]we are going to go on a guided town walk this afternoon[/1]. || Woman: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station? || Man: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still going to go to the book festival after school? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The event finished yesterday, so that plan will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could meet at the cafe instead. That might be fun.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I checked, but it is full because of a party. My cousin had a different idea: we are going to go on a guided town walk this afternoon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds good. Shall we meet near the station?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, at four o'clock. Then we can go together before dinner.

items.question: What are the friends going to do?

options.C: Go on a guided town walk

items.explanation: The speaker says they are going to go on a guided town walk this afternoon.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the cycle ride.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the cycle ride tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use. || Girl: Almost. I was going to bring a towel, but the teacher said we will not need that there. || Boy: What about a map? Do we need that? || Girl: Not this time. The message says [1]everyone needs to bring a bicycle helmet because the teacher will check safety before we leave[/1]. || Boy: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now. || Girl: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Have you packed for the cycle ride tomorrow? I'm trying not to take things I will not use.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Almost. I was going to bring a towel, but the teacher said we will not need that there.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: What about a map? Do we need that?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Not this time. The message says everyone needs to bring a bicycle helmet because the teacher will check safety before we leave.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Thanks for telling me. I will put it in my bag now.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good idea. We leave early, and there will not be time to go back home.

items.question: What should the student take?
items.explanation: The speaker says everyone needs to bring a bicycle helmet because the teacher will check safety before we leave.

items.context: You hear two people choosing food in a cafe.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us. || Man: Not yet. I considered the chicken sandwich, but I had bread at breakfast. || Woman: What about the soup? It looks good today. || Man: I thought about that too, but it looks rather small. I think [1]I'll have the bean chilli because it comes with rice[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay. || Man: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to order for lunch? The queue is getting longer behind us.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Not yet. I considered the chicken sandwich, but I had bread at breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What about the soup? It looks good today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I thought about that too, but it looks rather small. I think I'll have the bean chilli because it comes with rice.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good choice. I'll decide while you pay.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Fine. Let's find seats by the window before all the tables are taken. We still have time before class begins.

items.question: What food does the speaker choose?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses the bean chilli because it comes with rice.

items.context: You hear two students talking about the dance class.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you see the message about the dance class this afternoon? I was going straight to the gym. || Girl: Do not go there, because a basketball match is taking place. The teacher cannot use that room today. || Woman: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the main hall. || Girl: That is wrong too, because the floor is being cleaned. The latest message says [1]we must meet in the drama studio after lunch[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place. || Girl: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you see the message about the dance class this afternoon? I was going straight to the gym.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Do not go there, because a basketball match is taking place. The teacher cannot use that room today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Oh. I heard some people were waiting by the main hall.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That is wrong too, because the floor is being cleaned. The latest message says we must meet in the drama studio after lunch.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Thanks. I would have gone to the wrong place.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I will tell the others before registration, so nobody misses the start.

items.question: Where should students go for the dance class?
items.explanation: The latest message says they must meet in the drama studio after lunch.

items.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the football stadium.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the football stadium tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the train. || Boy: I was, but the station is closed this evening, so it is not a good idea now. || Man: Could you cycle instead? It might be quicker. || Boy: I checked, but I do not have lights. [1]I'm taking the coach because it leaves from outside the school[/1]. || Man: That makes sense. When will you arrive? || Boy: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How are you getting to the football stadium tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the train.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I was, but the station is closed this evening, so it is not a good idea now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Could you cycle instead? It might be quicker.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but I do not have lights. I'm taking the coach because it leaves from outside the school.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That makes sense. When will you arrive?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Just before ten. I will send you a message when I get there, and we can meet near the entrance.

items.question: How will the speaker get to the football stadium?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses this way of travelling because it leaves from outside the school.

items.context: You hear two people talking about work at the garden centre.
items.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the garden centre this afternoon? I thought you had to water plants. || Man: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning. || Woman: So are you going to move heavy pots instead? || Man: No, because that needs two people. The manager said [1]my job today is to label the seed packets[/1]. || Woman: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five? || Man: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: What are you doing at the garden centre this afternoon? I thought you had to water plants.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That was yesterday. Someone else has already done it this morning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So are you going to move heavy pots instead?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No, because that needs two people. The manager said my job today is to label the seed packets.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds manageable. Will you finish by five?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I hope so. If it stays quiet, I should finish early and have time to meet my friends afterwards.

items.question: What job will the speaker do?
items.explanation: The speaker says their job today is to label the seed packets.
